Tuscan Salmon.summary: Seared salmon fillets in a rich, creamy garlic sauce with sun-dried tomatoes and fresh spinach — an Italian-inspired dinner ready in 35 minutes.

Carbonara.summary: A classic Roman pasta dish with crispy pancetta, silky egg and Pecorino sauce, and plenty of black pepper — simple, indulgent, and deeply satisfying.

Chicken Tacos.summary: Smoky spiced chicken in warm flour tortillas with fresh salsa, creamy avocado, and sour cream — a crowd-pleasing weeknight favourite.

American Grilled Chicken Wrap.summary: A classic American-style wrap packed with juicy grilled chicken, crisp romaine, cheddar, and creamy ranch dressing — ready in under 30 minutes.

Argentinian Grilled Steak Salad.summary: Tender sliced flank steak over fresh salad greens with chimichurri dressing — a bold, protein-packed salad inspired by the asado tradition.

Australian Avocado Toast with Egg.summary: Creamy smashed avocado on toasted sourdough topped with a fried egg, feta, and chilli flakes — the brunch staple done right.

Brazilian Black Bean Bowl.summary: Hearty spiced black beans served over brown rice with fresh coriander and lime — a plant-based bowl full of flavour and fibre.

British Baked Salmon with Veg.summary: Flaky oven-baked salmon with lemon and dill alongside roasted seasonal vegetables — a wholesome, no-fuss traybake.

Chinese Stir Fry Vegetables.summary: A vibrant wok of crisp vegetables tossed in a savoury ginger and soy sauce — quick, light, and packed with colour.

Egyptian Ful Medames.summary: Slow-cooked fava beans mashed with garlic, lemon, and cumin — a nourishing Egyptian street food classic served with warm pita.

Ethiopian Lentil Stew.summary: Red lentils simmered in aromatic berbere spice with ginger and tomato — a warming, fibre-rich stew from the heart of East Africa.

Filipino Chicken Tinola.summary: A light and restorative Filipino chicken soup with ginger, green papaya, and leafy greens in a clear savoury broth.

French Ratatouille.summary: A rustic Provençal vegetable stew of aubergine, courgette, peppers, and tomatoes slow-cooked in olive oil and thyme.

German Chicken Vegetable Soup.summary: A hearty, wholesome German-style chicken soup with root vegetables, leek, and fresh parsley — the ultimate comfort in a bowl.

Greek Chicken Salad.summary: Grilled chicken over crisp romaine with cucumber, olives, feta, and a lemony oregano dressing — a fresh Mediterranean classic.

Hawaiian Poke Bowl.summary: Fresh sushi-grade tuna marinated in soy and sesame over sushi rice with avocado, cucumber, and nori — a taste of the Pacific.

Indian Lentil Dal.summary: Creamy red lentils cooked down with turmeric, cumin, garam masala, and tomatoes — a comforting and nourishing Indian staple.

Indonesian Gado Gado Salad.summary: Blanched vegetables, crispy tofu, and boiled eggs drizzled with a rich peanut and lime dressing — Indonesia's beloved salad.

Italian Caprese Salad.summary: Ripe tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and fragrant basil drizzled with extra virgin olive oil and balsamic glaze — Italian simplicity at its finest.

Japanese Teriyaki Salmon.summary: Salmon fillets glazed in a sticky homemade teriyaki sauce and served over steamed rice — a quick, elegant Japanese-inspired dinner.

Jordanian Chicken Freekeh Bowl.summary: Spiced chicken and nutty freekeh grain simmered in chicken stock with warm allspice and cinnamon, topped with toasted almonds.

Korean Bibimbap.summary: A vibrant Korean rice bowl topped with seasoned vegetables, marinated beef, a fried egg, and spicy gochujang — mix it all together and enjoy.

Lebanese Fattoush Salad.summary: A tangy Lebanese salad of fresh herbs, crisp vegetables, and toasted pita chips dressed with lemon, olive oil, and sumac.

Mediterranean Chickpea Bowl.summary: Fluffy quinoa topped with chickpeas, feta, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and olives with a bright lemon oregano dressing.

Mexican Chicken Burrito Bowl.summary: Seasoned grilled chicken over rice with black beans, corn, fresh salsa, avocado, and cheddar — everything you love about a burrito, in a bowl.

Moroccan Chickpea Tagine.summary: A fragrant North African stew of chickpeas, courgette, and carrot simmered with cumin, paprika, cinnamon, and raisins.

Nepalese Vegetable Curry.summary: A mild and comforting Nepalese curry of potato, cauliflower, peas, and carrot simmered in a fragrant turmeric and cumin broth.

Peruvian Quinoa Bowl.summary: A nourishing Peruvian-inspired bowl of quinoa, roasted sweet potato, black beans, and avocado with a zesty lime dressing.

Spanish Grilled Shrimp with Rice.summary: Juicy garlic and paprika shrimp served over saffron rice with roasted peppers — a vibrant taste of coastal Spain.

Swedish Salmon Salad.summary: Flaked salmon over mixed greens with baby potatoes, cucumber, and a fresh dill and yogurt dressing — light, elegant Scandinavian flavours.

Thai Basil Chicken.summary: Minced chicken stir-fried with garlic, chilli, and fragrant Thai basil in a savoury oyster and fish sauce glaze — fast, fiery, and full of flavour.

Turkish Chicken Shish Kebab.summary: Marinated chicken skewers grilled until charred and juicy, served on flatbread with yogurt and salad — a classic Turkish street food.

Vietnamese Fresh Spring Rolls.summary: Delicate rice paper rolls filled with shrimp, vermicelli, fresh herbs, and crisp vegetables, served with a hoisin peanut dipping sauce.
